indicators.name: sink
indicators.rationale: The presence of a sink suggests a kitchen area, which is not suitable for computer work.

indicators.name: cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets suggest storage, not a workspace.

indicators.name: marble countertop
indicators.rationale: A countertop is not a flat work surface suitable for computer work.

indicators.name: dark flooring
indicators.rationale: Dark flooring can be difficult to work on, especially when using a laptop.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of a sink and cabinets, along with the dark flooring and lack of a flat work surface, make it unsuitable for focused knowledge work. However, the absence of high-traffic areas and the potential for a flat surface on the countertop if rearranged slightly could make it marginally suitable for some computer work.
